## Architecture impact

See [`docs/architecture/ARCHITECTURE-CHANGE-CHECKLIST.md`](docs/architecture/ARCHITECTURE-CHANGE-CHECKLIST.md)

- [ ] **Not applicable** — change does not affect data schemas,

- [ ] **Architecture docs updated** — `docs/ARCHITECTURE-CANONICAL.md`

      row added. Known-gap entries created or resolved where

If neither box is checked the `arch-doc-guard` workflow will emit
a `::warning` annotation. The warning is advisory; CI still passes.
